title: I KNOW – On the aesthetic of truth — Unzip
summary: Aaajiao’s “Unzip” is a 88 zip sub-package file. Each zip is an NFT. If the collector wishes to unzip the sub-package, they must collect all of the 88 zip sub-packages. Is it possible that an NFT, which creates value out of trading, may also inspire curiosity and solidarity through trading?
